calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioners: Xiu Juan Wu and Piu Yeung Lam, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jia Yu Lin, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Kelvin Kayu Lam.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Amended

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Xiujuan Wu, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jiayu Lin, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Wayne Wu.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is taken off calendar.
